verses.text: The Nazarite vow: abstain from wine and grapes. Nazarite. A special separation unto God.
The Nazarite vow: abstain from wine and grapes. Nazarite. A special separation unto God.
The Nazarite vow: abstain from wine and grapes. Nazarite. A special separation unto God.
The Nazarite vow: abstain from wine and grapes. Nazarite. A special separation unto God.
No razor on the head; touch no dead body; all his days are holy. Separated. His whole life is set apart.
No razor on the head; touch no dead body; all his days are holy. Separated. His whole life is set apart.
No razor on the head; touch no dead body; all his days are holy. Separated. His whole life is set apart.
No razor on the head; touch no dead body; all his days are holy. Separated. His whole life is set apart.
If defiled, he must begin his separation again. Defiled. Holiness once broken must be renewed.
If defiled, he must begin his separation again. Defiled. Holiness once broken must be renewed.
If defiled, he must begin his separation again. Defiled. Holiness once broken must be renewed.
If defiled, he must begin his separation again. Defiled. Holiness once broken must be renewed.
At the vow's end he brings his offerings. Offerings. His separation is completed in worship.
At the vow's end he brings his offerings. Offerings. His separation is completed in worship.
At the vow's end he brings his offerings. Offerings. His separation is completed in worship.
At the vow's end he brings his offerings. Offerings. His separation is completed in worship.
At the vow's end he brings his offerings. Offerings. His separation is completed in worship.
He shaves his head and burns the hair on the altar. Finished. The vow is fulfilled.
He shaves his head and burns the hair on the altar. Finished. The vow is fulfilled.
He shaves his head and burns the hair on the altar. Finished. The vow is fulfilled.
This is the law of the Nazarite. The law. God honours special devotion.
God gives Aaron the words to bless the people. The blessing. Priests speak God's favour.
God gives Aaron the words to bless the people. The blessing. Priests speak God's favour.
God gives Aaron the words to bless the people. The blessing. Priests speak God's favour.
'The LORD bless thee... and give thee peace'; so they put His name on Israel. His name. God's blessing rests on His people.
